projectDescription: Webhooktrap is a webhook debugger that captures every incoming webhook exactly as it arrives, then lets you replay it to localhost or staging and see the full response.
keyFeatures: Instant anonymous inboxes — no account required to start capturing webhooks
Faithful payload capture — every method, header, query string, and byte preserved
One-click replay to localhost or any staging URL
Full response visibility — see status code, latency, and response body after replay
Read-only share links — teammates can inspect events without an account
48-hour anonymous retention; persistent inboxes for signed-in users
Works with any HTTP webhook provider (Stripe, GitHub, Shopify, Twilio, and more)
REST API for programmatic inbox creation, event listing, and replay triggering
HTTPS ingest with redacted authorization/cookie headers
publicApiSurface: GET /api/v1/inboxes/:id/events — list captured events for an inbox
POST /api/v1/events/:id/replay — replay a captured event to a destination URL
Ingest URL: /i/:inboxId — webhook endpoint that receives payloads from any provider
